findings.summary: Researcher subagent rejected by user, died with zero output. Re-dispatch with incremental-write guard succeeded. ~65K tokens wasted on first attempt.
findings.evidence: First arxiv-agent-knowledge agent returned error, no file written. Second arxiv-sweep-2 with write-after-2-searches instruction succeeded.
findings.proposed_fix: Enforce incremental-write in all researcher agent dispatches via agents/researcher.md hard requirement

findings.summary: Stop hook false positive: flagged 'aren't committed' as claiming commits exist. Regex doesn't handle negation.
findings.evidence: stop-verify-claims.sh blocked exit with false claim about unverified commits
findings.proposed_fix: Fix stop-verify-claims.sh regex to exclude negated commit references

findings.summary: Produced 2 compiled articles before researching whether compilation helps agents. Research then showed pre-synthesis hurts. Correct sequence: evaluate first, produce after.
findings.evidence: Dispatched compile-epistemic + compile-scaffolding (~210K tokens) before wiki-vs-flat research
findings.proposed_fix: Follow existing feedback_evaluative_questions.md — 'should we X?' gets assessment first, not production

findings.summary: Sent recovery message to dead agent via SendMessage. Agent was already terminated, message had no effect, wasted 15s polling.
findings.evidence: SendMessage returned success but agent was dead. sleep 15 + ls found nothing.
findings.proposed_fix: After agent rejection/error, re-dispatch fresh. Don't attempt SendMessage recovery on terminated agents.
